response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'IRIS OUT' by Wataru Sena from on-screen text and audio. 2. Identified performer Miyo Minase from on-screen text. 3. Searched for lyrics using 'IRIS OUT Wataru Sena'. Found English and Japanese lyrics that match the audio. 4. Created two scenes: song performance (00:00-04:33) and talk (04:33-05:01). 5. Populated JSON with metadata and extracted lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTuber Miyo Minase, followed by a short introductory talk. The song is 'IRIS OUT', composed by Wataru Sena.

scenes.description: VTuber Miyo Minase performs the song 'IRIS OUT', with music and lyrics by Wataru Sena. The performance includes dancing and choreography.
